description_long: This object is a compact, sawed-off style rifle with a dark wooden stock and foregrip, featuring a smooth, curved handle and a short, matte black barrel. The receiver and trigger assembly are robust, with a visible trigger guard and a detachable box magazine located beneath the action. The barrel is notably short, giving the weapon a stubby appearance, and the muzzle is plain with no visible attachments. The wood grain on the stock and grip is prominent, contrasting with the metallic components. There is a simple iron sight mounted on top, and the overall finish is utilitarian, suggesting a weapon designed for close-quarters use. The rifle's construction appears solid, with a mix of wood and metal materials.
description: A compact, sawed-off rifle with a dark wooden stock, short matte black barrel, and detachable box magazine. The finish is utilitarian, with visible wood grain and simple iron sights.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the rounded muzzle and the narrow profile of the barrel and foregrip.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the curved wooden stock, short barrel, trigger assembly, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the rounded end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the smooth wooden stock, short barrel, and the magazine, mirroring the details of the other side.
